description: Let your little child play with much glee in these slip-resistant Diamond floaters from disney. You are sure to feel contented with your choice when you see that your kid is playing on the clouds in these soft footbeds and padded straps. Upper Durable and soft upper with velcro closure straps over the forefoot, midfoot and the ankle Extra padding over the ankle and forefoot straps Soft, foamy PU footbed with ergonomicallu raised nubs for all-day massage feel Outsole TPU outsole with crab claw like structures around the periphery for absolute grip and traction Flex grooves along the vertebra of the outsole for added grip Small lugs all over for further grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
